description: Authoritative renewal timing source: signed lease or lease-term record with lease dates.
notes: Storage system is a tracked client ask; High sensitivity material must not be imported for retrieval.

description: Tenant contacts and property/owner context (Rentvine is read-authoritative).
notes: Read-only candidate discovery; no write path.

description: Current rent, charges, and lease terms for the renewal candidate.
Sources defining renewal timing, fees, and exceptions.
notes: Named in product-doc discovery; needed before confident renewal policy output.

description: Notice language, legal constraints, and escalation rules for renewals.
notes: Renewal work must not invent legal, fee, timing, owner-approval, or tenant-notice facts.

description: Approved owner renewal outreach drafts and templates.
notes: Default first location is the PMI KC-accessible Drive source-of-truth folder.

description: Recorded demo, client context, and team-provided renewal workflow notes.
notes: Team-editable source-of-truth folder; curated through AI-proposed changes with Dan's review.
